name: Tex-Mex Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ground Meat (Beef, Turkey, or Chicken)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss onion, tomatoes, lettuce, and cheese with Italian dressing; set aside.
2. Brown the meat in a pan over medium heat until no longer pink.
3. Add the drained kidney beans and vegetable seasoning to the pan. Simmer for 10 minutes.
4. Mix the cooked meat mixture with cold salad ingredients (lettuce, tomatoes, cheese).
5. Toss in crushed tortilla chips and sliced avocado.
6. Garnish with olives if desired.
